'''Alater-ka''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Barab I/Legends|Barab I]]. It served as both a residential [[City/Legends|city]] and a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]].

Alater-ka was the only permanent underground city and spaceport on the planet. It was built by [[Shaka-ka]] in honor of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Osted Alater]], who exposed the deception of [[Planetary Safaris Inc.]], which had been hunting native [[Barabel/Legends|Barabels]]. It was, at times, used to facilitate [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] operations on Barab I, and help ensure the protection of the natives. During negotiations by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to gain access to the starport facilities, the Barabel ambassador was knocked unconscious by the over-zealous [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] bodyguard [[Ahk'laht]].

Alater-ka and the surrounding area was destroyed by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].
